name: Flinn, Heber Howard
description: He has two occupations: Running the German department, and looking for his soul-mate. Most confidential fellow in school. His one request of all his friends is, "Now please, don't get my name in this."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Collins, Alice Gwendolyn
motto: "Think you I am no stronger than my sex?"
description: She spends some of her time in studying and much more of it in working the faculty. She intends to be a lawyer if people will just leave her alone.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Davis, William Cleveland
clubs: President of the Y. M. C. A.
description: He is no politician, but he is an accomplished office-holder. He has not sought honors, but they have been thrust upon him as the result of his overwhelming co-ed support. His ambition is to be nominated, against his will, for circuit clerk of Sebastian County.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_01.png

name: McHenry, Harvey
description: He is a quiet and unassuming youth who would rather sleep twelve hours than study one. Shuns falling in love like a deadly enemy.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Norris, Claire
description: Has been very active in college life. Many of the girls would be surprised to know that she is president of the Girl's Dormitory. Is patroness of the Sigma Moody Fraternity. Claire is somewhat involved in college politics but attends classes between campaigns.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Moody, William Franklin
description: Moody is of a decided musical turn and leads the band on St. Patrick's Day. He has many marked peculiarities, but we don't know what they are. Is matron at the Sigma Moody House.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Penix, William Roy
description: Willie Roy is a conscientious and patriotic student and is always there with his part. He is the class hope in football and is destined to make a touchdown in law.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Pulliam, Nelson
description: Pulliam says that four years' residence is all that is necessary to get a diploma. He is a law student and is involved in a case at Van Buren.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Mccartney, Ruth
description: Ruth has just been coming up to the University since the year one, and now she knows it all. Aided by Quinland, she is able to conquer anything, even German 4a. Her aspiration is to be chief assistant in a biological laboratory when she expects to charm some specimen with her song.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Sanderlin, David B.
description: Sandy is treasurer of the Boys' Dormitory, but stays at Carnall Hall. His desire for knowledge is not yet satisfied; but, for the life of him, he can't decide whether he ought to do graduate work or come back next year, change his name, and enter Freshman on his own merits.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Taff, Nollie Olin
description: A quiet, easy, good-for-nothing sort of a fellow who wastes his time reading Shakespeare and Chaucer. When not reading he is humming some innocent little ditty and smiling slyly to himself. During the summer, he teaches singing schools and writes poetry for the Waldron Reporter.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Allen, Benjamin Franklin
description: The original Benjamin Franklin was much like our Ben. Allen is considered one of our most forceful speakers for several reasons. First, because he always has an idea; second, because he believes that an idea should be expressed; and third, because he knows how to express an idea in the most methodical and effective manner. He agrees with Mr. Bryan.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Pettigrew, Ruth May
description: Ruth is a student but no grind. Is a charter member of the Skull. Has a way all her own of looking enthusiastic when a professor makes a statement. She intends to study law, but is taking the model school work as a bluff.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Pettigrew, Lucile Aldrich
motto: "No, I am not melancholy, but I am serious; and it is proper that we should be so."
description: Lucile detests snap courses and is said to study calculus for recreation. She succeeded herself as class historian.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Hulse, Leonard Ross
motto: "Now by two-headed Janus, Nature hath formed strange fellows in her time."
description: Hulse is a physics fiend and a man after Prof. Ripley's own heart. He studies a little during the day and plays the violin during study hours at night.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_04.png

name: King, Sarah Ella
description: An A. B. from Ouachita. Came here to study Greek and Latin. It is said that she reads the stuff without a pony.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Pittman, May
motto: "To be or not to be, that is the question."
description: A maid of many whims, but studying is her very lightest. She will be great some day, for May is a girl of "Ernest" aspirations.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Webb, Claude Allen
description: Claude goes his part in everything. He has such a leaning towards the scriptural that when he became entangled in the web of romance, he chose a biblical character to rescue him—and her name was Ruth.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Brewer, Mack Hamilton
description: As major of the battalion, Mack constitutes the military department. With the help of the Commandant, he has brought the department up to a high degree of efficiency. He knows the distinction between "Squads Right" and "Port Arms," and can execute "Pass in Review" by himself.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Badinelli, Eugene Bard
description: Bad is class pugilist and is extremely handy on class day occasions. He is thinking seriously of taking up Civil Engineering as a life work.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Carter, Ollie
description: Formerly of Ouachita. Discovered his unfitness for the arts and came to the University where he discovered his unfitness for Civil Engineering. For any further information concerning him, we refer you to Carter himself, as he has made a close study of the subject.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Harlan, Earl T.
description: One of the few who have the reputation of working Daddy Droke. A Civil Engineer who travels in the interest of St. Patrick's Day.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Harrison, Jere F.
description: Asks the blessing at the Boys' Dormitory. Used to study a great deal. Will probably enter society after graduation.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Oneal, Elias Harvey
description: An engineer with a reputation for E's. It is claimed that he even reads the texts on military science and tactics. If not in his room he can be found at the Engineering Hall.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_06.png

name: McCoy, Jessie Marie
description: One of the twins. Jess does things because she wants to. She has time for study as well as for pleasure. Her ambition is to teach mathematics. Her favorite expression is, "Have you seen my special attraction?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Lee, Shelley H.
description: Her special attraction. Has been in the University four years and in love two. Was class president in Junior year. Through association, he has become much like "Daddy" Droke.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_07.png

name: McCoy, Bess Cedelia
motto: "They say we are as much alike as two eggs." "A jewel which shines by its own light."
description: The quietest, most demure maiden in school. Bess wants to teach school next year but doesn't want to teach with Jess.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Green, Thomas Andrew
description: Was born and reared in Howard County. Secured his early education in the public schools of that county. At the completion of his public school course, he began teaching, but was compelled to retire from the profession on account of his health. He then became identified with the King-Richardson Book Co. Becoming convinced through his contact with the world, of his need of a higher education he came to the University.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Wood, Olive
description: Olive is a modest, sly little girl, who won't go through the corridors unless somebody goes with her. Likes to study and to be let alone. Had rather read Milton than go to a show any time.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Wood, John Samuel
motto: "He hath never fed on the dainties that are bred in a book, he hath not eat paper, as it were; he hath not drunk ink."
description: "Dick" has formed many habits during his career in college, such as grinning at the fair sex and appreciating at once the poorest jokes. He used to be a regular breezer, but in his Senior year he has joined the bachelor's club.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Cypert, Boyd
description: The athlete of the class. Although he is often seen around the Hall, he never attends classes except between football and baseball seasons.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Stallings, Robert
description: Stallings is past master of the art of stalling. Is long in Theology and goes to church to criticize the preacher. Bob is a civil engineer of great promise and intends to work at his profession.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Pye, Ruth Esther
description: A torch whose light can not be hid. Is president of the Y. M. C. A., and has held every office in the gift of her class. Is not a politician, but she knows who the politicians are. Is enthusiastic over teaching and may be found in the model school any time. After graduating, she intends to teach—for awhile.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Austin, Roy M.
motto: "Oh, Carnall Hall, what charms thou hast for me."
description: The biggest breezer in school. Was heard to say in his dreams, "Oh, Carnall Hall, what charms thou hast for me." His greatest aspiration is to be called "Prof." and already he has become known by that name in the Model School.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Corbell, Oscar M.
description: Bishop Corbell has had charge of his present diocese since the funeral of the '11 class. Though a socialist, he is usually mild and harmless in company. His exceptions to your views are final. Is Dr. Johnson's last resort in Ethics. As class prophet, he is easily first among all the prophets. Is an X-Ray and served on its defense committee.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Joiner, Joseph William
description: The ladies' man. Is eternally harassed by them—so he says. Joe is the natural champion of the people and the sworn enemy of "graft" and "predatory wealth." Spends the summer making Fourth of July speeches and delivering Farmers' Union lectures. He will study law, and aspires to be the next representative from Columbia County.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Takata, N. I.
description: Our little "Jap" is brimful of the ambition and tenacity so characteristic of his race. He has a way of "doing things" and "getting there with his part" that insures his making good. Takata has a strong stand with the co-eds, and takes advantage of this fact now and then. Immediately after his return to Kobe City, Takata intends to electrocute Russia.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Jones, Leah Thompson
motto:
"Unthinking, cute, wild and young,
I laughed and danced and talked and sung."
description: "Jonesy" is better known in the corridors than in the classroom. Once upon a time she was a proctor but few people could even guess it.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Miles, Walter Carrigan
description: "‘Tec’ is the boy with the dreamy eyes and the Southern accent. Never studies but has spieling down to a fine art. Favorite with both faculty and student body.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Knox, Robert Carr
description: Bob's courtly air has gained him the title of Lord Knox. His largeness of heart, broadness of judgment, and greatness in cordiality over-balances his smallness in size.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Blackshire, Jennie Lacy
motto: "How truly is a kind heart a fountain of gladness."
description: Is studious but never too busy to smile. Always has a nod and a kind word for the Freshmen. Stands high in Torch circles. Is poet of the Senior class.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Wolf, Guy Walker
motto: "Turn on the light."
description: Is a little, wiry, keen-faced "Guy," always at a high pressure, and alive to the gravity of the situation. Always carries a reserve supply of thunderbolts ready to be turned loose at the slightest provocation.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Blackshire, Lena Ellis
description: Lena has a mind of her own and, if urged, will express her opinion. She is resourceful and enthusiastic, and knows how to do the next thing well. Always helps write the class song or yell for the occasion.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Highfill, Herbert H.
clubs: Collector of tithes, the University Weekly
description: Is conservative and inclined to be reticent, either because he knows a great deal or for some other reason. Will likely star in the business world.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Gates, David Allen
motto: "Meagre were his looks, Sharp misery had worn him to the bones."
description: "Bones" was unknown until his oratory began to resound in the Ozark Hills. Now he even ventures to sing.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hirst, Claude Marvin
description: Claude is an intellectual phenomenon. Could read the Commercial Appeal at four years of age. At five, he had read and thoroughly enjoyed Adam Smith's "Wealth of Nations." His mind is a veritable warehouse of statistics. He is a law student and a ring politician—but usually on the outside of the ring.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Armitage, J. Gordon
description: "Tige" is class knocker. If anything has gone wrong it is Tige's duty to knock on somebody for not setting it right. He knocks where knocking is needed regardless of class, position, "race, color, or previous condition of servitude." Got his name in the paper on the X-Ray deal. Was one of its defense committee.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Holloway, Claudius Victor
description: Is zealous, thoughtful and ambitious. Is an orator of the first class and a future statesman. Holloway usually has some opinions of his own, but you won't find out what they are.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Harris, Eutha
motto: "Full of mirth and song."
description: That "sweet, mild and gentle maid" who haunts the corridors at the University. She blushes and dimples at regular intervals.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Hayes, Ernest
description: Though not the whole Glee Club, Hayes is by far the greater part of it. His love for song is equaled only by his enthusiasm over History. Hayes is noted for his originality in dealing with historical facts.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Plemmons, Lee Roy
description: A trim little engineer who is often mistaken for an A. B. because of his good looks. Bridge building is natural to him. He used to make grape vine bridges when a boy.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Hilt, Emma Frances
description: There is a deep seriousness beneath the pleasant smile. She does things but says nothing about it. You would be surprised to know just how great a little girl she really is.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Wood, Corinna Susan
motto: "If love, alas be pain, the pain I bear No thought can figure and no tongue declare."
description: She isn't very studious, but she doesn't care. She will charm all by her power of song.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Wood, Roy Gilbert
motto: "Eagles suffer little birds to sing."
description: He not only manages the Glee Club, but Dr. Carroll even lets him sing. Roy is very timid and has never crossed the danger line of Carnall Hall.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Wade, Alice
description: She waded in Latin and declared it shallow; she stirred up the heavenly firmament to the extent that Halley's comet came almost in contact with the earth. In fact, she revelled in astronomy to such a degree that the poet said of her, "O thou art fairer than the evening air, Clad in the beauty of a thousand stars."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Meriwether, Lilbourn H.
description: You might judge from his name that he is not human but a pleasant condition of the atmosphere; but please correct this idea, for he is the most original and wittiest boy in school. He dazzles Dr. Johnson.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Galloway, C. Harrison
description: Galloway is the Guy from Hendrix. Came to the University to play football and take Geology 2. Is rather conservative about his class work. Will impress you as being deep and thoughtful. Hasn't much use for girls, but thinks they are nice sometimes for ornamental purposes. Is chief fulminator of the X-Ray staff and one of its defense committee.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Lenker, Leslie E.
description: Les is Mr. Tovey's adopted son. It is said of him that he thinks so rapidly that no one as yet has been able to catch onto his train of thought. Looked up to as a big engineer. His town is named after him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Robinson, Agnes
description: Baby is very quiet, but when she desires to express she can always be heard. She startles all with her views. She will teach English somewhere, some day.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Young, W. T. Clint
description: Clint looks like he intends to hurt you, but he doesn't. It is just his way. He is a good fellow and can play football.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_15.png

name: McLeod, Laurence Spurgeon
description: Sober, earnest and conscientious. Studies hard because he thinks it is his duty. Will be there at seven o'clock if he says he will. He will succeed somewhere—of course, we can't say where. Mack has put more E's on the grade book than any other student in the University.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Pulliam, Lucy
description: Lucy is an earnest and thoughtful girl, but can smile when the occasion demands it. Studies math, because she likes it. Is sometimes seen in the library reading magazines. Would like to teach.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Evans, D. J.
description: Jack dug his first ditch with a grubbing hoe when a mere boy, but has since learned to dig them on paper. He shows a marked inclination to attend to his own business and to sleep. The Freshmen take him for a Prof.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Hogue, Effa Lydia
description: Came back this year to take the rest of the arts courses. Is a suffragette and doesn't know but what she may enter politics in the near future. If so, she will make the race for county superintendent on the Socialist ticket.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Dickinson, John Allen
motto: "I am not in the role of common men."
description: "Sonny" loves adventure and always does the unusual thing. Never comes to the Main Building unless the commandant calls for him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Purcell, Walter Ray
description: A true and sincere man on whose word you can always rely. He never lost his temper but once and that was when a young lady, despite his modest denial, complimented his handsome physique and as a climax to her argument said, "Why, then, do you walk as if you had swallowed a ramrod?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Paul, Claude Willis
description: Paul is an engineer, but that doesn't make any difference—he is in love. You can see it in his eyes. He spends most of his time wiring air castles. Has been known to cut drill.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Southworth, Quinland
description: Ruth's co-worker for an education. Thinks Biology III the most delightful course in school. May be found in the library at the table next the librarian's desk, on the side not facing the girls.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Rogers, L. H.
description: Tom Watt's room-mate. Rogers is a calculus fiend and an electrical engineer of some promise. He has installed an electrical door-bell system in his home which works like a charm.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Renick, Ethel
motto: "I am the very pink of perfection."
description: Ethel is a good student and stands in with the faculty. Her views never conflict with those of others, except on woman suffrage.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Caudle, Reuben D.
description: Reuben not only believes in calling a spade a spade, but believes that is what it really is. He is no man of romance; facts are the commodities in which he deals. He is "eminently practical" in everything. His ambition is to teach the ignorant.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_18.png

name: McGill, Samuel Davis
clubs: Senior member of the firm, "Bragg & McGill"
description: Sam is taking an M.E. course, but is at the same time working for a B.A. After graduating he intends to farm and teach school.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Aubert, Martin
description: D. B. Sanderlin's ward. Very tiny, but full of opinions. Laughs when he thinks it necessary. Aubert intends to marry and settle down.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Lea, R. A.
description: Plays the clarinet and does a little E. E. work on the side. Can be found at the Lyric.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Jackson, Thomas A.
description: Tom made his debut in Carnall Hall in 1912 and since then he has been constantly smiling. He has made a wonderful record in Economics and no doubt will be a powerful lawyer when he puts all his Elizabethan ideas into practice.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Smith, Lucy
description: Lucy is a student and hopes to know everything some day. She acquired that far away, dreamy look trying to memorize the Aeneid. Is taking the Normal course so that if she ever has to teach she will know how.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Marshall, Irma
motto: "Those love her most who know her best."
description: She arrived late in the year, but she will leave with her class.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Laughinghouse, Newman R.
motto: "Got to class on time once in 1909. Is always rushed. Though he has a funny name, he is in reality one of the most serious fellows you ever saw."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Files, Frank
motto: "I am slow of study."
description: "Sleepy" has formed the habit of walking in his sleep. You can never tell when he is awake. They say he studies a great deal. We predict that he will wake up some day and find himself famous.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Tilley, Irene
motto: "A gentle and unassuming creature."
description: "Tilly's" chief delight is to teach down in the model school, but she doesn't like to be observed. Had rather be seen than heard. Knows how to make a smile count for all that it is worth.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Jordan, Floss
description: Floss has studied hard while in school and has had some little experience in life. Her favorite occupation is performing experiments in the pedagogical laboratory.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png

name: King, Arthur
description: Thinks a great deal but never says anything about it. Is a hard student when he is not in love. Feels that this is a critical period in his life.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Buckley, V. B.
description: Buck plays a little ball now and then and visits his home at Rogers. We are not advised as to whether he ever studies any.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1912.pdf_页面_20.png
